profile.title: Profile
profile.placeholder: TODO: complete in Phase 3 with full profile
profile.deleteAccount_confirm_msg: Your account and all your data will be deleted in 30 days. During that time you can cancel by contacting us. All active subscriptions will be cancelled.
profile.deleteAccount_confirm2_msg: This is your last confirmation. Deletion will be scheduled. You have 30 days to cancel it.
profile.deleteAccount_scheduled_msg: Your account has been scheduled for deletion in 30 days. You will receive an email with the details. Signing out now.
profile.deleteAccount_error_msg: We could not process your request. Please try again or contact support.
profile.cancelCoach_noAssignment: No active plan with your coach was found.
profile.cancelCoach_confirm_msg: If you cancel, the chat becomes read-only at the end of the cycle. Your access is maintained until that date.
profile.cancelCoach_success_msg: Your access to the coach continues until the end of the billing cycle.
profile.cancelCoach_error_msg: We could not cancel the plan. Please try again or contact support.

manageSubscription.subtitle: Your PRO subscription

analyticsConsent.title: Improve your experience
analyticsConsent.body: We use anonymous analytics to understand how the app is used and improve it. We do not collect personal or health data. You can change this anytime from your profile.
analyticsConsent.note: If you decline, the app works the same. We do not share your information with third parties.

sensitiveConsent.title: Sensitive data
sensitiveConsent.body: Progress photos and body metrics are sensitive health data. Do you authorize their processing according to the Privacy Policy? Only you and your coach can access them.
sensitiveConsent.note: You can delete your data at any time from your account settings.
sensitiveConsent.errorDesc: You can continue anyway; we will retry on your next session.

exportData.success_desc: Your data file has been generated and is ready to share.
exportData.error_desc: Check your connection and try again.
exportData.sharing_unavailable: Your device does not support file sharing.
